priorities.title: Restructure top-3 blog leak pages for AI Overview citation
priorities.description: Add FAQ/HowTo schema, put the authored answer in the first 80 words, surface paid-course CTA above the fold. AI Overview is answering the query in place — we need to be cited and pull the click back.
priorities.estimated_lift: +~50K clicks/28d (recover blog CTR to 1.5%)

priorities.title: Get cited in Google's AI Overview for "photography courses"
priorities.description: An AI Overview exists for "photography courses" (6,600/mo) but no alanranger.com citation. Add a short, structured answer block on https://www.alanranger.com/photography-courses-coventry that directly answers the AIO query, followed by 3-5 supporting FAQs using question/answer schema markup mirroring the AIO summary.
priorities.estimated_lift: 6,600/mo AIO query · ~£396/mo revenue → ~£356/mo profit at 90% GP

priorities.title: Lift CTR on free online photography course
priorities.description: https://www.alanranger.com/free-online-photography-course has 48,057 impressions/28d at 1.38% CTR. Rewrite the SERP title (~60ch) and meta description (~155ch) to lead with the customer's outcome + price + location. Target 2.1% CTR.
priorities.estimated_lift: ~£285/mo revenue → ~£282/mo profit at 99% GP (from +356 clicks/mo)

priorities.title: Surface orphan product: SOMERSET Landscape Photography Workshops 9 - 11 May 2025

latest_revenue.notes: Booking Sheet truth: operational_revenue = D2C+B2B (headline); adjustment_net = voucher/deferred-spend timing line; revenue_amount = full 12-category sum (= YTD Actual cell, the reconciliation basis). _nonjlr and _jlr slices come from booking_sheet_transactions and reconcile to revenue_amount where the transactions reconcile to the category grid.
